ticket.title: NO EXPLANATION FOR 'ESTIMATED' VS 'FROM EZQUOTE' RATE LABELS

test_cases.page: Package Rates by Hotel Tier (Admin & Agent)
test_cases.description: Verify a tooltip or inline note appears when hovering/clicking the 'ESTIMATED' tag explaining what it means.
test_cases.expected_result: A clear explanation displays (e.g., 'This rate is not yet confirmed and may change').

test_cases.page: Package Rates by Hotel Tier (Admin & Agent)
test_cases.description: Verify the 'FROM EZQUOTE' tag and 'ESTIMATED' tag remain visually distinguishable at a glance.
test_cases.expected_result: Tags are easily distinguishable by color/style, consistent with existing design language.

test_cases.page: Package Rates by Hotel Tier (Admin & Agent)
test_cases.description: Verify the explanation for 'ESTIMATED' is consistent between Admin and Agent views.
test_cases.expected_result: Same tooltip/explanation text appears in both Admin and Agent views.
